info.title: Synapse
info.description: Self-organising wiki backend — M5 Phase 1 (F5 4-phase retrieval + [n] citations). 4-signal knowledge graph (F4): direct×3 + source-overlap×4 + Adamic-Adar×1.5 + type×1. FA2 server-side via igraph (I2); coords persisted in Postgres; dataVersion-debounced GraphCache; GET /graph precomputed coords (ADR-0014). Pluggable inference provider (F17): Local/Ollama, API/Anthropic-compatible, CLI/claude-agent-sdk. Bounded orchestrated ingest loop (I7). POST /ingest/upload: multipart upload → ingest (ADR-0020 Feature U). POST /ingest/from-text: inline text → ingest (ADR-0019 §2.7, AC-F6-5 save-to-wiki). GET /search: F5 4-phase RAG retrieval (ADR-0022, AC-F5-6). GET|PUT /import-schedule + POST /import-schedule/run-now: scheduled folder import (ADR-0020 Feature S). Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern [K1–K8].

get.description: Returns vault_id, current data_version (monotonic ingest counter), service started_at, and uptime_seconds. (AC-REST-1, AC-F16dv-3)
Paginated list of pages where deleted_at IS NULL. Supports limit/offset. (AC-REST-2)

get.summary: Get a single page by UUID
get.description: Returns full page metadata; 404 if unknown or deleted; 422 on invalid UUID. (AC-REST-3, AC-REST-6)

patch.summary: Persist a manual node drag position and pin the node
patch.description: Updates pages.x/y and sets pages.pinned=true so the node stays at the dropped position across FR recomputes.  Also patches the live GraphCache snapshot in place so the next GET /graph HIT reflects the new position immediately. Does NOT trigger FR, does NOT bump data_version — O(1). (Feature A, I2)

post.summary: Manually trigger ingest of a single file
post.description: Synchronously ingests the file at file_path through the seam. Returns HTTP 202 with typed {task_id, status, page_id} (ADR-0006, AC-REST-4, AC-D4u). status is 'completed' or 'skipped' (I1 fast-path).

422.description: Validation error (missing file_path, bad format, or file not found)

post.summary: Upload a document for async watcher-driven ingest
post.description: Feature U (ADR-0020 §2, M4-EXT non-blocking). Accepts a single text/markdown file (.md/.txt/.markdown) via multipart/form-data. Writes to vault/raw/sources/<name> (I5) and returns 202 immediately. The watcher observes the write and ingests asynchronously (~15-30s). Strict basename-only path sanitization (ADR-0020 §2.2). 413 on oversize (MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES). 415 for non-text (names F12/M5). 422 for unsafe filename. 202 {file_path, status:'queued', overwritten}.

202.description: File saved; watcher will ingest asynchronously

415.description: Only .md/.txt/.markdown accepted in v0.4; multi-format (F12) is planned for M5

422.description: Filename is empty or unsafe after sanitization

post.summary: Write inline text to raw/sources/ and queue watcher-driven ingest
post.description: Save-to-wiki seam (ADR-0019 §2.7, AC-F6-5). Materialises ``text`` to ``vault/raw/sources/chat-<hint>.md`` and returns 202 immediately. The watcher picks up the file and runs the full ingest pipeline (no new ingest logic — ADR-0003 guarantee, I1/I6). ``source_hint`` is sanitised to a safe basename; falls back to ``chat-<uuid>`` when omitted or unsafe. 422 on empty text.

202.description: Text saved; watcher will ingest asynchronously

422.description: Validation error (text empty or too long)

get.description: Run the F5 4-phase retrieval pipeline (ADR-0022 §2.2, AC-F5-6) and return a grounded context string + citation list. Phase 1: dense vector search via bge-m3 (Qdrant, top-k). Phase 2: BFS graph-expansion over the `edges` table (depth ≤ 2). Phase 3: token-budget allocation (20% of context_window, F14). Phase 4: context assembly with inline [n] markers. 0-hit query → 200 with empty results + empty context (AC-F5-7a). READ-ONLY — never bumps data_version (AC-F5-5). Documented in openapi.json (I8, AC-F5-6).

parameters.name: q

schema.description: The query string to retrieve context for
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: The query string to retrieve context for

parameters.name: k

schema.description: Dense top-k for the vector phase (1..50); default 8 (ADR-0022 §2.1)
schema.title: K

parameters.description: Dense top-k for the vector phase (1..50); default 8 (ADR-0022 §2.1)

422.description: Validation error (k out of range or missing q)

get.description: Returns a paginated, started_at DESC list of ingest_runs rows. Exposes the I7 cost ledger to the user (AC-BE-IR-1..5, ADR-0018 §7). limit: 1..100 default 20; offset: >=0 default 0; vault_id: optional UUID filter. Column aliases: max_iter_used→iterations_used, finished_at→completed_at. total_cost_usd serialised as a number; frontend formats to exactly 4dp (I7).

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Max rows to return (1..100); 422 on out-of-range (AC-BE-IR-2)
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Max rows to return (1..100); 422 on out-of-range (AC-BE-IR-2)

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Row offset for pagination (>=0); 422 on negative (AC-BE-IR-2)
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Row offset for pagination (>=0); 422 on negative (AC-BE-IR-2)

parameters.name: vault_id

schema.description: Optional vault_id filter; omit to list all vaults (AC-BE-IR-2)
schema.title: Vault Id

parameters.description: Optional vault_id filter; omit to list all vaults (AC-BE-IR-2)

422.description: Validation error (limit out of 1..100 or offset < 0)

get.description: Returns all raw provider_config rows. No API key field is stored or returned (§12). (F17, AC-F17-6)

post.summary: Create or update a provider_config row
post.description: Create a new provider_config row. provider_type must be one of: local | api | cli. NO api_key field is accepted or stored — keys are env-only (§12). (F17, ADR-0008)

422.description: Validation error (invalid provider_type, scope, or operation)

delete.summary: Delete a provider_config row by UUID
delete.description: Hard-delete the provider_config row with the given id. (F17)

get.description: Returns the active embedding config read from environment variables (EMBEDDING_URL, EMBEDDING_MODEL, EMBEDDING_DIM). Read-only — edit .env to change. (I9)

get.summary: Get scheduled folder import config + last-run status
get.description: Returns the current import schedule configuration and last-run status for the vault. Returns sane defaults (enabled=false, frequency='1h') if no row has been configured yet. Feature S (ADR-0020 §4.6).

put.description: Create or update the import schedule for the vault. Validates source_dir: if the directory does not exist inside the container, the row is still saved but dir_ok=false + dir_message is returned (save-then-warn). frequency must be one of '15m' | '1h' | '6h' | 'daily'. Config changes take effect on the next scheduler tick without a restart. Feature S (ADR-0020 §4.6).

200.description: Config saved (dir_ok may be false if mount is missing)

post.summary: Trigger one bounded import scan immediately
post.description: Trigger one bounded scan of source_dir immediately (same bounds as the scheduler: IMPORT_SCAN_MAX_FILES + IMPORT_SCAN_MAX_SECONDS, I7). The scan runs in the background; poll GET /import-schedule for the result. 409 if a scan is already in-flight. 400 if disabled or source_dir unset/missing. Feature S (ADR-0020 §4.6).

400.description: Schedule is disabled, source_dir not set, or directory missing

409.description: A scan is already in-flight (I7 — no overlap)

get.summary: List chat conversations for a vault
get.description: Returns live (non-soft-deleted) conversations for a vault, ordered updated_at DESC (drives last-active restore, AC-F6-1). Paginated (limit 1..100, offset >=0). F6.

post.description: Create a conversation {vault_id?, title?}. Also implicitly created by /chat/stream when conversation_id is null. F6 (ADR-0019 §2.5).

get.summary: Get ordered message history for a conversation
get.description: Messages ordered created_at ASC. content is RAW incl. literal <think>… (AC-F7-2). 404 if the conversation is unknown/soft-deleted. F6.

delete.description: Sets deleted_at (ADR-0005 pattern). 404 if unknown/already deleted. F6.

post.description: Bounded chat turn (F6/F7, I6/I7, ADR-0019 §2.2). Returns 200 with application/x-ndjson: one JSON event per line (token | think | done | error). Routes via resolve_provider_config('chat', vault_id) — never a hardcoded provider (I6). Bounded by token_budget + timeout (I7); total_cost_usd in the done event. 404 if conversation_id is unknown; 503 if no chat provider resolves.

get.summary: Precomputed knowledge graph (nodes + edges with FA2 coordinates)
get.description: Returns the precomputed graph with FA2 layout coordinates (I2, F4, ADR-0014). HIT (X-Graph-Cache: hit): pure read from persisted coords + edges — no FA2. MISS (X-Graph-Cache: miss): one inline synchronous recompute, then return. Synchronous 200 — never 202 (AQ-v0.3-3). A second request at the same data_version is always a HIT (G2).

ChatMessageIn.title: ChatMessageIn
ChatMessageIn.description: One turn in a ChatRequest. Mirrors the backend-neutral Message shape (I6).

ChatMessageResponse.title: ChatMessageResponse
ChatMessageResponse.description:
API shape for one messages row (ADR-0019 §2.5). `content` is RAW incl. literal
<think>… (AC-F7-2); the client re-derives think-vs-content with the same split.

conversation_id.title: Conversation Id
conversation_id.description: null = start a new conversation (id returned in done event)

context_window.title: Context Window
context_window.description: F14 window override (4096..1_000_000); null → provider/32K default

regenerate.title: Regenerate
regenerate.description: AC-F6-4: delete the last assistant message before re-streaming

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest
ChatRequest.description:
Request body for POST /chat/stream (ADR-0019 §2.2).

The server NEVER accepts provider_type / model_id (I6 / Do-NOT #4): the backend resolves
`resolve_provider_config("chat", vault_id)`. `operation` is fixed to "chat" so the same
abstraction can route ingest-vs-chat differently.

ConversationCreate.title: ConversationCreate
ConversationCreate.description: Request body for POST /conversations (ADR-0019 §2.5). vault_id defaults to settings.

ConversationResponse.title: ConversationResponse
ConversationResponse.description: API shape for one conversations row (ADR-0019 §2.5).

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Structural edge kind: "link" (direct wikilink) | "source" (shared provenance). ADR-0016 §4

GraphEdgeResponse.title: GraphEdgeResponse
GraphEdgeResponse.description:
One graph edge in the GET /graph response (ADR-0014 §6, AC-F4-3, ADR-0016 §4).

source/target are page-id strings (UUID). Undirected — emitted once per pair.
kind: structural edge discriminator — "link" (wikilink exists) or "source"
      (shared-source provenance only). ADR-0016 §4.

degree.title: Degree
degree.description: Structural degree: count of distinct incident structural edges (direct-link or shared-source); drives size (ADR-0016 §2/§4)

GraphNodeResponse.title: GraphNodeResponse
GraphNodeResponse.description:
One graph node in the GET /graph response (ADR-0014 §6, AC-F4-3, ADR-0016 §4).

Required: id, title, type, x, y.
Optional rendering hints (derived server-side): size, degree.

GraphResponse.title: GraphResponse
GraphResponse.description:
GET /graph response payload (ADR-0014 §6, AC-F4-3, AC-D4v3-1).

cached: true on a HIT (no FA2 this request), false on a MISS (FA2 ran inline).
Header X-Graph-Cache: hit|miss mirrors cached (ADR-0014 §5).

last_run_at.title: Last Run At
last_run_at.description: Timestamp of the last completed scan; null if never run

last_status.title: Last Status
last_status.description: ok | error | running | skipped_disabled | dir_missing | null

last_imported_count.title: Last Imported Count
last_imported_count.description: Files copied (new/changed) during the last scan

last_error.title: Last Error
last_error.description: Error detail from the last failed scan; null on success

dir_ok.title: Dir Ok
dir_ok.description: False if source_dir does not exist/is not readable inside the container

dir_message.title: Dir Message
dir_message.description: Warning message when dir_ok is False; null when ok

ImportSchedulePutResponse.title: ImportSchedulePutResponse
ImportSchedulePutResponse.description:
PUT /import-schedule response body (ADR-0020 §4.6).

Extends ImportScheduleResponse with dir validation fields (save-then-warn).

last_run_at.title: Last Run At
last_run_at.description: Timestamp of the last completed scan; null if never run

last_status.title: Last Status
last_status.description: ok | error | running | skipped_disabled | dir_missing | null

last_imported_count.title: Last Imported Count
last_imported_count.description: Files copied (new/changed) during the last scan

last_error.title: Last Error
last_error.description: Error detail from the last failed scan; null on success

ImportScheduleResponse.title: ImportScheduleResponse
ImportScheduleResponse.description:
GET /import-schedule response body (ADR-0020 §4.6).

Returns the current config + last-run status for the vault's import schedule.
Returns sane defaults (enabled=false, frequency="1h") if no row exists yet.

text.title: Text
text.description: Raw text to ingest (e.g. an assistant message)

source_hint.title: Source Hint
source_hint.description: Optional hint for the output filename stem, e.g. a message_id or short slug. Sanitised to basename; falls back to 'chat-<uuid>' when omitted or unsafe.

IngestFromTextRequest.title: IngestFromTextRequest
IngestFromTextRequest.description:
Request body for POST /ingest/from-text (ADR-0019 §2.7, AC-F6-5 save-to-wiki).

Writes ``text`` to ``vault/raw/sources/chat-{message_id}.md`` (or a derived name)
and runs the same ``ingest_file`` seam (ADR-0003).  No new ingest logic — only a
file-materialisation step.

example.text:
# Homelab notes
Docker services on TrueNAS...

page_id.title: Page Id
page_id.description: Page UUID when ingest completes synchronously (trigger path); null when async (watcher path).

IngestRunListResponse.title: IngestRunListResponse
IngestRunListResponse.description:
Paginated list response for GET /ingest/runs (ADR-0018 §7, AC-BE-IR-1).
Ordered started_at DESC (AC-BE-IR-3).

pages_created.title: Pages Created
pages_created.description: Wiki pages persisted during this run

total_cost_usd.title: Total Cost Usd
total_cost_usd.description: Total cost in USD; 0.0 for local/cli; serialised as number (I7)

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: Run finish time (aliases finished_at); null for running rows

error_message.title: Error Message
error_message.description: Error detail for failed runs; null otherwise

IngestRunResponse.title: IngestRunResponse
IngestRunResponse.description:
API response shape for one ingest_runs row (ADR-0018 §7, AC-BE-IR-1).

Column aliases (no DB rename — ADR-0018 §7 decision):
  max_iter_used  → iterations_used
  finished_at    → completed_at
total_cost_usd serialised as a float; frontend formats to exactly 4dp (I7).

task_id.title: Task Id
task_id.description: Async task UUID (None in v0.2 synchronous mode; filled in v0.3+)

page_id.title: Page Id
page_id.description: UUID of the ingested page row

IngestTriggerResponse.title: IngestTriggerResponse
IngestTriggerResponse.description:
Typed 202 body for POST /ingest/trigger (AC-D4u — task_id appears in OpenAPI schema).

task_id is None in v0.2 (synchronous path); v0.3 fills it with a real async task UUID.
status: "completed" | "skipped" (I1 fast-path) | "queued"/"running" (async, v0.3+).

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: ingest | chat | lint; required when scope='operation'

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: Model name (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6); lives only in DB rows (AC-F17-8)

base_url.title: Base Url
base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint; NULL for Anthropic/local default

ProviderConfigCreate.title: ProviderConfigCreate
ProviderConfigCreate.description:
Request body for POST /provider/config (F17).

Stores NO API key (§12 / ADR-0008 §3). Keys are env-only inside provider/.
model_id must be provided explicitly — no hardcoded defaults in app code (AC-F17-8).

ProviderConfigResponse.title: ProviderConfigResponse
ProviderConfigResponse.description: API response shape for a provider_config row (§12: no api_key field).

context.title: Context
context.description: Assembled context string with inline [n] markers (≤ token_budget, ADR-0022)

results.title: Results
results.description: Citations in rank order (vector seeds first, then expansions by edge weight)

data_version.title: Data Version
data_version.description: Snapshot read BEFORE assembly — proves the call is read-only (AC-F5-5)

token_budget.title: Token Budget
token_budget.description: 20% of context_window used as the retrieval slice

SearchResponse.title: SearchResponse
SearchResponse.description:
GET /search response (ADR-0022 §2.5, AC-F5-6).

read-only — never bumps data_version (AC-F5-5).
0-hit → 200 with empty results + empty context (AC-F5-7a).

id.title: Id
id.description: UUID of the pages row (== Qdrant point id, ADR-0002)

title.title: Title
title.description: Frontmatter title or filename stem (never empty, §2.6)

slug.title: Slug
slug.description: slugify(title) — derived, not a DB column (§2.6)

SearchResultItem.title: SearchResultItem
SearchResultItem.description:
One citation entry in the GET /search response (ADR-0022 §2.5, AC-F5-6).

Maps to Citation.{n, ref.id, ref.title, ref.slug, score, phase}.

file_path.title: File Path
file_path.description: Saved path relative to vault_root, e.g. "raw/sources/notes.md"

status.title: Status
status.description: "queued" — file saved to raw/sources/; watcher ingests asynchronously.

overwritten.title: Overwritten
overwritten.description: True if a same-name file already existed and was replaced on disk

UploadResponse.title: UploadResponse
UploadResponse.description:
202 response body for POST /ingest/upload (ADR-0020 §2.1, M4-EXT non-blocking).

file_path:  saved path relative to vault_root (e.g. "raw/sources/notes.md")
status:     always "queued" — the watcher picks up the file asynchronously.
overwritten: true if a same-name file already existed and was replaced on disk.

page_id is not returned because ingest is async (watcher-driven); poll GET /ingest/runs
or GET /pages to confirm the page exists after ingest completes (~15-30s).
